title: 10 × 650ml Plastic food containers with lids, Microwave, and freezer-safe, Heavy-duty, Rectangular, BPA-free, Reusable and Recyclable (650ml)
features: Leak-Proof Design: These airtight food storage containers prevent spills and leaks, making them perfect for storing soups, sauces, and liquids. Use them in the freezer without worry.
Stackable & Reusable: Save space in your kitchen with these stackable containers. They're reusable and ideal for all your food storage needs.

Large Capacity: Our food containers come in a pack of 10 providing plenty of storage space. Ideal for meal prepping or as lunch boxes, these containers are perfect for all your storage needs. The clear design makes it easy to see the contents inside.
Microwave & Freezer Safe: No need to transfer food! These plastic containers with lids are both microwavable and freezer-safe. Perfect for work or school lunches and kitchen storage.
Tight Fit: The secure lids keep food fresh and prevent spoilage. These containers are perfect for both airtight and freezer storage, ensuring your food stays fresh longer.
description: Product Description "Versatile Comfort: Available in 4 different sizes" 500ml 650ml 750ml 1000ml Perfect for All Meals Large Capacity : Our food containers come in a pack of 10 providing plenty of storage space. Ideal for meal prepping or as lunch boxes, these containers are perfect for all your storage needs. The clear design makes it easy to see the contents inside. Heavy-duty Premium Containers: Crafted from strong materials to ensure longevity and reliable performance, even with frequent use. These containers resist cracking and warping, providing a dependable storage solution for years. Perfect for everyday use and long-term storage, they stand up to the rigors of a busy kitchen. All-in-One Solution Microwave & Freezer Safe: Perfect for work or school lunches and kitchen storage. Effortlessly transition from storing leftovers to reheating meals without transferring contents. These containers withstand extreme temperatures, ensuring your food remains safe and delicious. Enjoy the convenience of preparing meals in advance and easily reheating them when needed. Convenient and Efficient: Provides a dependable and efficient way to manage all your food storage needs. These containers streamline your kitchen processes, from prepping and storing to reheating and serving. Enjoy the peace of mind of knowing your food is stored in high-quality, safe containers. Versatile Use: Ideal for meal prepping, storing fresh produce, packing lunches, and more. Use them to organize pantry items, freeze batch-cooked meals, or keep snacks fresh on the go. Their versatility makes them a must-have for any kitchen, accommodating various storage needs. Key Benefits Versatile and Durable Perfect for all your food storage needs Experience the versatility and durability of our food storage containers, ideal for all your meal prep and storage requirements. Whether you're storing fresh produce, freezing meals for later, or reheating leftovers, these containers are built to last and perform. Ultimate Convenience Dishwasher, Microwave and Freezer-safe containers Our containers are designed to handle all your food storage needs, offering the ultimate convenience with their microwave, freezer, and dishwasher-safe properties. Heat your meals effortlessly, freeze leftovers without worry, and clean up quickly—all with the same reliable containers. Space-Saving Design Stackable and Sturdy containers in Packs of 10 Organize your kitchen and office space easily using our stackable and sturdy containers. Each pack includes 10 containers that save space and keep your pantry or refrigerator neat. Their durable design ensures they stay securely stacked, even when filled.
